final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a "电商周年庆" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Tmall / JD.com 618 grand promotion visual language, 2010s Chinese e-commerce banner design tradition, Memphis-influenced tech-product campaign graphics; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical poster layout with a clear hierarchy — headline at top, product/brand focal area in center, CTA zone at bottom
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 as the featured brand and product hero
Scene/backdrop: needs a festive, high-energy campaign backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, celebratory mood — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, energetic palette befitting a 618 sale campaign — exact color selection is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "618" (large, primary headline), "周年庆" (secondary display text)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
